description_for_human: Send and receive files securely via end-to-end-encrypted peer-to-peer transfer with zero cloud storage.
description_for_model: SRIFT is a zero-config, zero-token, peer-to-peer file transfer + E2EE chat tool. Use srift_quick_share to deliver any file in one call — it returns a public https://srift.app/d/<token> URL the recipient downloads with any HTTP client (browser, curl, wget). The RECIPIENT NEEDS NOTHING INSTALLED. Sender's local daemon (auto-installs) streams the bytes through the signaler. Optional maxDownloads/ttlMs for sharing limits. For longer interactive collaboration (chat + multi-file + approvals), use srift_start_session + the browser join-session UI instead. AES-256-GCM, PBKDF2 100k iters, WebRTC/WebTorrent/WebSocket transport. No API keys needed. Stdio + HTTP MCP, REST/OpenAPI, and CLI all supported. Read AGENTS.md or https://srift.app/ai-agents for full instructions.
